document.title: Literature Search Report for ADD Abyz Digital Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Literature Search Report for ADD Abyz Digital Detector supporting clinical evaluation through literature search on digital flat panel X-ray detectors.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as a clinical evaluation literature search report identifying publications relevant to effectiveness, safety, performance, and comparable devices for ADD.
keyPoints: ADD is described as a Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting adults and children.
The device is not to be used for mammography.
The device is classified as Class IIa by Rule 10 of Annex IX, MDD 93/42/EEC as amended by Directive 2007/47/EEC.
The literature search covered publications from 2000 to 2019 and was performed from 2020.01.05 to 2020.06.15.
Eight literatures were used for the clinical evaluation report.

reviewFlags.reason: The source metadata authoritySignal is general, while the document text only states MDD 93/42/EEC as amended by Directive 2007/47/EEC; no issuing authority or notified body is identified.
The cover page shows Date 2020.06.18, but prepared, review, and approval signatures are dated Aug/26/2020.
The header document number is A-TCF-5-064, while the cover also states Report No.: A-TCF-5-060 (Rev.0), creating a document identifier ambiguity.
